ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Product name */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Product description */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Product category */,
  "product_subcategory" TEXT /* Product subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the products table */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the product size */,
  "size_dimensions" TEXT /* Product size dimensions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product pricing tier */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the product_sizes table */,
  "tier_name" TEXT /* Name of the pricing tier */,
  "min_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity for the pricing tier */,
  "max_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum quantity for the pricing tier */,
  "price_per_item" TEXT /* Price per individual item for the pricing tier */,
  "price_per_case" TEXT /* Price per case for the pricing tier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the product_sizes table */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product size in inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product size */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customers table */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the orders table */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the product_sizes table */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product size ordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the orders table */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Customer name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer email */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Customer phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g. warehouse staff, sales personnel, inventory manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log was created */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
